requirement_topic.en: Battery regulation scope and SNI conformity — SPPT-SNI, SNI mark, and importer responsibilities
requirement_topic.zh: 电池监管范围与 SNI 合规——SPPT-SNI、SNI 标识及进口商责任
requirement_topic.zht: 電池監管範圍與 SNI 合規——SPPT-SNI、SNI 標識及進口商責任

summary.en: Indonesia requires mandatory SNI in sectors where products are listed under the national mandatory standard system. For lithium battery products, BSN and Kemenperin route includes BSN-registered conformity assessment institutions and the mandatory SPPT-SNI mark on products or packaging. LSPro-type approved bodies are used for factory audit and surveillance where scope requires conformity, and importers are generally the local responsible party for market entry, customs filing, and post-market traceability. For appliances, ESDM energy labeling may apply on top of SNI evidence when the product scope and voltage class are covered. Grid practice is 230 V, 50 Hz and differs from the typical Chinese domestic 220/380 V split.
summary.zh: 印度尼西亚在列入强制清单的产品范围内要求实施强制 SNI。锂电池产品通常依据 BSN 与工业部路径进入该制度，需通过 BSN 认可机构进行符合性评定并在产品或包装上贴付 SPPT-SNI 标识。对于要求厂内审核和持续监督的范围，需使用 LSPro 等认可机构进行审核，进口商通常是承担市场准入、海关申报和事后追溯的在地责任方。对于家电类产品，在落入适用范围时可能另有 ESDM 能源标签要求。电网为 230 V、50 Hz，电压条件与中国常见 220/380 V 分布不同。
summary.zht: 印尼在列入強制清單的產品範圍內要求執行強制 SNI。鋰電池產品通常依據 BSN 與工業部路徑進入該制度，需透過 BSN 認可機構進行符合性評定並在產品或包裝上貼付 SPPT-SNI 標識。對於要求工廠審核及持續監督的範圍，需使用 LSPro 等認可機構進行審核，進口商通常是承擔市場准入、海關申報和事後追溯的在地責任方。對於家電類產品，在落入適用範圍時可能另有 ESDM 能源標籤要求。電網為 230 V、50 Hz，電壓條件與中國常見 220/380 V 分佈不同。

standards_or_laws: BSN and Ministry of Industry (Kemenperin) compulsory product scope notices (SNI framework)
SNI conformity framework, including SPPT-SNI registration and marking requirements
BSN accreditation framework for conformity assessment bodies, including LSPro-type bodies
Energy Law implementation references and market rules that link energy-label and labeling obligations to product class

summary.en: China applies GB-based safety and market frameworks such as GB 31241 and associated CNCA/SAMR requirements for applicable categories. There is no nationally adopted SPPT-SNI system, no SNI mark, and no equivalent LSPro pathway. Chinese certificates support domestic conformity but do not replace Indonesian mandatory SNI routes.
summary.zh: 中国采用 GB 体系安全和市场准入框架，如 GB 31241 及 CNCA/SAMR 对适用品类的要求。中国不存在全国性 SPPT-SNI 体系，也没有对应的 SNI 标识和 LSPro 审核路径。中国证书支持中国国内合规，但不能替代印尼强制 SNI 体系的市场准入程序。
summary.zht: 中國採用 GB 體系安全和市場准入框架，如 GB 31241 及 CNCA/SAMR 對適用品類的要求。中國不存在全國性 SPPT-SNI 體系，也沒有對應的 SNI 標識及 LSPro 審核路徑。中國證書支持中國國內合規，但不能替代印尼強制 SNI 體系的市場准入程序。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment
China Compulsory Certification (CCC), where the product category is included in CNCA catalogues

gap.en: China compliance cannot replace the Indonesia-specific mandatory system. The gap is structural: SNI scope determination by BSN and Kemenperin, SPPT-SNI mark placement, and LSPro-linked audit obligations, plus a local in-country importer or responsible representative model. Chinese GB documentation is useful as technical baseline, but not as a legal entry route for Indonesian market placement.
gap.zh: 中国合规不能替代印尼特定制度。差距属于结构性：由 BSN 与工业部决定的强制 SNI 范围、SPPT-SNI 标识，以及与 LSPro 连接的审核义务，并要求本地进口商或责任代表模型。中国 GB 资料可作为技术基础，但不能替代印尼市场准入的法定路径。
gap.zht: 中國合規不能替代印尼特定制度。差距屬於結構性：由 BSN 與工業部決定的強制 SNI 範圍、SPPT-SNI 標識，以及與 LSPro 連接的審核義務，並要求本地進口商或責任代表模型。中國 GB 資料可作為技術基礎，但不能替代印尼市場准入的法定路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the product falls into Indonesia's mandatory SNI scope. SPPT-SNI mark and conformity process through accredited pathways are required before market placement.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market sale under China framework where applicable, but no equivalent SPPT-SNI marking or LSPro pathway exists.

source.publisher: Kementerian Perindustrian Republik Indonesia and Badan Standardisasi Nasional

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Indonesia imposes a market-entry model that is not mirrored by China's domestic export framework. For lithium battery and power bank exports, SNI scope confirmation, SPPT-SNI mark readiness, and a local responsible import structure are mandatory before placement. China GB and CCC documents are technical evidence only and do not replace Indonesia's in-country conformity path.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 印度尼西亚执行一种中国国内不能镜像的市场准入模型。对锂电池和移动电源出口而言，须先确认 SNI 适用范围、具备 SPPT-SNI 标识条件，并建立本地责任进口结构。中国 GB 与 CCC 资料仅为技术证据，不能替代印尼的在地合格评定途径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 印度尼西亞執行一種中國國內不能鏡像的市場准入模型。對於鋰電池和行動電源出口而言，須先確認 SNI 適用範圍、具備 SPPT-SNI 標識條件，並建立本地責任進口結構。中國 GB 與 CCC 資料僅為技術證據，不能替代印尼的在地符合性路徑。
